title: Inpasa Obtains International Certification and Strengthens its Role in SAF Production
content: Inpasa, the largest ethanol producer in Latin America, received the ISCC CORSIA international certification, a strategic credential that enables the company to supply raw materials for the production of Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF). With this achievement, the company consolidates its leadership position in the country's renewable energy chain and becomes part of a select group of global suppliers committed to the decarbonization of the aviation sector.
author: Analysts Account
